definitions: 各种各样的；一系列（后接复数名词或不可数名词）

examples.text: Some researchers assert dogs will one day help doctors diagnose diseases, as some dogs have already demonstrated the ability to detect an assortment of ailments, including diabetes and certain types of cancer.
examples.explanation: 一些研究人员声称，狗有一天将帮助医生诊断疾病，因为有些狗已经显示出检测多种疾病的能力，包括糖尿病和某些类型的癌症。

splitFrom.reason: 这是例句中稳定可复用的数量/集合搭配，具有独立学习价值。
